assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains: name: pandas-data-cleaning, description: "Reusable patterns for cleaning tabular data with pandas — handling missing values, deduplication, column normalization, type conversion, and file I/O for CSV and Parquet formats."

assertion_results.text: The description mentions data cleaning or pandas or csv
assertion_results.evidence: description: "Reusable patterns for cleaning tabular data with pandas — handling missing values, deduplication, column normalization, type conversion, and file I/O for CSV and Parquet formats." — mentions 'pandas' and 'CSV'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values
assertion_results.evidence: Section '## 3. Handling Missing Values' (lines 95-162) provides a strategy selection guide table, a reusable handle_missing() function with per-dtype strategies (median, mean, zero, drop for numeric; fill value for categorical; False for boolean), and rules against global fillna(0)

Section '## 4. Deduplicating Rows' (lines 165-202) covers both full-row and key-based deduplication with a reusable deduplicate() function, sort-before-dedup pattern, and rules about logging removed rows and resetting index

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
assertion_results.evidence: Section '## 2. Normalizing Column Names' (lines 65-92) covers snake_case normalization with a normalize_columns function. Section '## 5. Converting Data Types' (lines 204-249) covers a reusable convert_types() function handling datetime, float, int, bool, category, and string conversions with nullable dtypes

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains at least one code example
assertion_results.evidence: Extensive code examples throughout: CSV/Parquet loading (lines 37-49), post-load inspection (lines 55-61), normalize_columns function (lines 72-83), handle_missing function (lines 114-148), deduplicate function (lines 180-194), convert_types function (lines 210-241), full pipeline template (lines 281-324), string cleaning (lines 357-364)

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with test cases
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 4 test cases (ids: eval-csv-full-clean, eval-missing-value-strategy, eval-dedup-with-natural-key, eval-type-conversion-messy)
